title: Fancy Gear | Reshaded Equipment
description:
Tools, weapons and armor overhaul, while mantaining the vanilla aesthetic!
(Now with copper and spear compatibility!)
body:
![Title of the Resource Pack: "Fancy Gear: Reshaded Equipment"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5e706d8a7a86742de9e31d0c56d38580fba1098.png)
---
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T81FJU3R)

**Fancy Gear** is a small Resource Pack that overhauls the way tools, weapons and armor sets are shaded, enhancing their colors and contrast, while **mantaining a Vanilla approach** for their new looks.

**Fancy Gear is now fully compatible with the new Copper tools and armor added in MC 1.21.9 and the Spears/Netherite Horse Armor added in MC 1.21.11!**

However, the Resource Pack doesn't only change the main equipment, but also tweaks some palettes that were inconsistent or needed some refreshing new colors for other items and gears, such as:
- Secondary weapons like the **Trident** and the **Mace**.
- **Sticks** and their derivative items like the **Fishing Rod**, **Bow**, **Crossbow** and **Arrow**.
- Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond and Netherite **Horse Armor**.

![Gif showcasing the new item textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efeaeb9890bcd9890f501c96cc45660ae681d88f.gif)
---
The Resource Pack also changes the **Copper, Iron, Gold and Diamond armor textures** to align their look with the one of Netherite armor, making them shinier and bumpier!

![4 renders of the new Copper, Iron, Gold and Diamond armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cad7fcb04ad51d1d7c708998beaa06821e45421e.png)

---
**Fancy Gear** is also fully compatible with all the items added by [GearPlus Data Packs](https://modrinth.com/collection/jxK8vNOo), changing many textures to match the **Fancy Gear** style and palettes.

The Resource Pack is compatible with MC 1.13-1.21.11 and 26.1, with support planned for any future versions!

---
### Support 
If you like my Data Packs, Resource Packs or textures, consider **donating**, it would really mean a lot to me. If you are interested in **commissioning** any content, **contact me** on any available platform, I'll try to reach out to you as fast as I can.

**Suggestions** for future Minecraft content are also well received. Thank you for taking a look at my content. :)
